title: (Bullish Signal) SRPT, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on October 29
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron A.I.dvisor found 44 similar cases, and 39 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 89%. Current price $134.61 crossed the support line at $138.50 and is trading between $138.50 support and $129.47 support lines. Throughout the month of 09/29/20 - 10/29/20, the price experienced a +0.15% Uptrend. During the week of 10/22/20 - 10/29/20, the stock enjoyed a +3% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/9e3g4jumeaw51.png?width=1525&format=png&auto=webp&s=6dbb8984e8b0dd0e466eb6e41909e11dd962abae

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where SRPT's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 21 of 24 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. 37 of 48 cases where SRPT's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for SRPT just turned positive on October 29, 2020. Looking at past instances where SRPT's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 33 of 41 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +1.34% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SRPT advanced for three days, in 286 of 344 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 83%.

SRPT may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
